title: agrostis spuria
intro: Agrostis spuria, also known as velvet bent or velvety bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis spuria include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health purposes.
